parameters.query:
-- CREATE TABLE sdr_chatwoot_message_info (
--     message_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
--     conversation_id INT,
--     account_id INT,
--     contact_id INT,
--     inbox_id INT,
--     chatid VARCHAR(20),
--     name VARCHAR(100),
--     tipo_mensagem VARCHAR(20),
--     urlchatwoot VARCHAR(255),
--     chatwoottoken VARCHAR(100),
--     tabela_whatsapp VARCHAR(50),
--     tipo_fluxo VARCHAR(50),
--     mensagem TEXT
-- );

SELECT * FROM sdr_chatwoot_message_info;

INSERT INTO sdr_chatwoot_message_info (
    message_id,
    conversation_id,
    account_id,
    contact_id,
    inbox_id,
    chatid,
    name,
    tipo_mensagem,
    urlchatwoot,
    chatwoottoken,
    tabela_whatsapp,
    tipo_fluxo,
    mensagem
) VALUES (
    {{ $('Webhook Chatwoot').first().json.body.messages.first().id }},  -- message_id
    {{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.conversation_id }},    -- conversation_id
    {{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.account_id }},       -- account_id
    {{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.contact_id }},   -- contact_id
    {{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.inbox_id }},      -- inbox_id
    '{{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.chatid }}', --chatid
    '{{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.name }}', --name
    '{{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.message_type }}', --tipo_mensagem
    '{{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.urlchatwoot }}', --urlchatwoot
    '{{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.chatwoottoken }}', --chatwoottoken
    '{{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.tabela_whatsapp }}', --tabela_whatsapp
    '{{ $('Extract Message Data').first().json.tipo_fluxo }}', -- tipo_fluxo
    '{{ $('Transcribe a recording').first().json.text }}'     -- mensagem
)
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO UPDATE SET
    conversation_id = EXCLUDED.conversation_id,
    account_id = EXCLUDED.account_id,
    contact_id = EXCLUDED.contact_id,
    inbox_id = EXCLUDED.inbox_id,
    chatid = EXCLUDED.chatid,
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    tipo_mensagem = EXCLUDED.tipo_mensagem,
    urlchatwoot = EXCLUDED.urlchatwoot,
    chatwoottoken = EXCLUDED.chatwoottoken,
    tabela_whatsapp = EXCLUDED.tabela_whatsapp,
    tipo_fluxo = EXCLUDED.tipo_fluxo,
    mensagem = EXCLUDED.mensagem;
